# Localizator3
> Мультиязычность для MODX Revolution 3. Локализация ресурсов, TV, товаров miniShop3 и опций. Версия: 1.0.8-beta.

## Documentation Index
- [docs/README.md]: Оглавление документации
- [docs/installation.md]: Установка, сборка Vue UI, CLI
- [docs/configuration.md]: Системные настройки localizator3_*
- [docs/api.md]: Сниппеты, Fenom, события, процессоры
- [docs/architecture.md]: Модели, плагины, Vue UI
- [docs/customization.md]: OnBuildLocalizationTabs, getformconfig
- [docs/integration-minishop3.md]: miniShop3
- [docs/integration-msearch.md]: mSearch
- [docs/roadmap.md]: План F1–F10, сравнение с Babel/WPML/Drupal

## Requirements
- MODX 3.0+, PHP 8.2+ (component: 8.1+), pdoTools, VueTools ≥1.1.2-pl, Node.js 18+ (build only)

## Core Files
- [core/components/localizator3/localizator.class.php]: Сервис (findLocalization, translate, versionedAsset, getLocalizedOption*)
- [core/components/localizator3/model/localizator3/]: xPDO-модели (localizatorLanguage, localizatorContent, locTemplateVarResource, locOption, locProductOption)
- [core/components/localizator3/processors/mgr/]: Процессоры (language/*, content/*, fields, lexicon/*)
- [core/components/localizator3/elements/snippets/]: Сниппеты (getLocalizedResources, getLanguageList, getLocalizedField, makeLocalizedUrl, getLocalizedCanonical, getLocalizedSitemap)
- [core/components/localizator3/elements/plugins/handlers/]: OnMODXInit, OnHandleRequest, OnDocFormPrerender, OnDocFormSave, OnLoadWebDocument, mseOnBeforeIndex, mseOnGetWorkFields, pdoToolsOnFenomInit
- [vueManager/src/components/ContentGrid.vue]: Inline-форма локализации на ресурсе
- [vueManager/src/components/LanguagesGrid.vue]: CRUD языков
- [vueManager/src/composables/]: useConnector, useLexicon, useDataTable, useGridCrud, useConfirmAction (созданы, интеграция — roadmap)
- [vueManager/src/app/createLocalizatorApp.js]: Bootstrap Vue UI
- [vueManager/src/entries/content.js]: Entry вкладки ресурса
- [vueManager/src/entries/languages.js]: Entry страницы «Языки»
- [assets/components/localizator3/js/mgr/vue-dist/]: Lean bundles (~14KB)
- [_build/build.php]: Transport-пакет

## Key Concepts
- **Язык**: localizator3_languages (key, name, http_host, cultureKey, active, rank)
- **Локализация**: localizator3_content (resource_id, key, pagetitle, content, active, …)
- **TV**: localizator3_tmplvar_contentvalues
- **MS3 опции**: localizator3_option, localizator3_product_option
- **Текущий язык**: $modx->localizator3_key, cookie localizator3_key
- **Fenom**: locfield, locoptioncaption, locproductoptionvalue

## Events (custom)
OnBuildLocalizationTabs, OnBeforeFindLocalization, OnFindLocalization, OnFindLocalizatorResource, OnToggleLocalizatorLanguage, OnBeforeSaveLocalization, OnSaveLocalization, OnBeforeSaveLocalizatorLanguage, OnSaveLocalizatorLanguage, OnHasLocalizatorError404

## Dependencies
- VueTools ≥1.1.2-pl (обязательно): Import Map vue, pinia, primevue
- pdoTools: pdoFetch.class = pdotools.pdofetchlocalizator3
- miniShop3 (опционально)
- mSearch (опционально)

## Vue UI
- ContentGrid: dropdown activeLanguages, inline-форма Document/TV, Save/Translate
- LanguagesGrid: DataTable, inline Dialog CRUD
- VueTools Import Map, lean entries, BEM + .vueApp isolation
- Richtext: Textarea (MODX RTE — roadmap)

## Build
```bash
cd vueManager && npm run build
cd .. && php _build/build.php
```
